deception_tactics.alpha: Claim the industrial heartland is historically and rightfully yours and frame it as non-negotiable; in reality you would accept treasury + defense compensation if beta ends up holding it.
deception_tactics.beta: Insist the heartland is your core industrial base; quietly you would trade it away for custody of the central treasury.
deception_tactics.gamma: Stay out of the heartland fight between alpha and beta; lock down defense command, your real prize, while they exhaust each other - and offer to broker as the neutral party.

issues.description: Who administers the dissolved union's industrial heartland - the single most valuable asset, claimed by BOTH alpha and beta as their own.
issues.name: industrial_heartland

issues.description: Who takes custody of the central treasury and its reserves.
issues.name: central_treasury

issues.description: Who assumes command of the unified armed forces.
issues.name: defense_command

logrolling: alpha and beta BOTH rank the industrial_heartland as their top priority - only one can hold it, so the contest is who wins it and how the loser is compensated on treasury/defense.
gamma's top priority (defense_command) does not collide with alpha or beta, so gamma can hold defense and broker the heartland fight as the neutral party.
A 'neutral steward' compromise (Gamma-Administered heartland) leaves both alpha and beta with a middling 5 each - acceptable to neither as a first choice but a possible fallback.
